THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IT IS SO ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED, THAT JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND AGAINST PLTF. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COST OF SUIT.
